rate_equation:
(; K_P_E, K_A_S_E, k_A_ES_to_EP, K_A_Areg, L, Keq, E_total) = params
(; S, P, A) = concs
# Wegscheider constraints:
K_I_S_E = K_A_S_E
# Haldane constraints:
k_A_EP_to_ES = (1 / Keq) * (1 / K_A_S_E) * K_P_E * k_A_ES_to_EP
v = E_total * ((k_A_ES_to_EP * S / K_A_S_E - k_A_EP_to_ES * P / K_P_E) * (1 + S / K_A_S_E + P / K_P_E) * (1 + A / K_A_Areg) ^ 2) / ((1 + S / K_A_S_E + P / K_P_E) ^ 2 * (1 + A / K_A_Areg) ^ 2 + L * (1 + S / K_I_S_E + P / K_P_E) ^ 2 * 1 ^ 2)
